## Type of change
<!-- Please check the options that are relevant. -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring (architectural or code structure changes)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Checklist:
<!-- Review this checklist before submitting. -->
- [ ] My code follows the Clean Architecture guidelines in `ARCHITECTURE.md`.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas (`///` for public APIs).
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (if applicable).
- [ ] My changes generate **no new warnings** (`flutter analyze` is clean).
- [ ] I have tested this code on a **physical device** (Emulators are not sufficient for video/UI testing).
